title: Monchlets!
description: A mod adding a few small fantasy creatures
body:
Monchlets is a mod that adds a variety of hybrids and speculative evolution style animals, starring the infamous monchi's!

Monchis are Hadrosaur-salamander hybrids found naturally in savannhas and badlands. Their patterns and colors are highly dependant on what they eat...

Alongside the Monchi are multiple friends, like the Pufferwyrm and Tusked Skink. Tusked skinks are territorial, nocturnal predators that hunt monchis and players! Tame a baby skinling with Monchi eggs to get a true beast of a companion.

and of course there is the Pufferwyrm, a small, flying snake that can be found anywhere and comes in a variety of biome-dependant skinks. 

Quick FAQ

Q: "What happened to my pets when I updated?"

A: The 1.1.0 and 2.0.0 versions of the mod are technically completely different mods, as I had to remake it from scratch, so your world may corrupt or your pets may disappear.

Q: "How do I obtain Puffdragon larvae???"

A: Breed puffdragons using sugarberries!

Q: "I thought this mod was cancelled?

A: I came back to it after I was motivated by seeing some fan designs of the monchi
Hope you enjoy this mod!
